title: artemisia campestris var. delphinensis
intro: Artemisia campestris var. delphinensis, also known as Mountain Sage, is a plant species within the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to the mountainous regions of the world. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Mountain Sage include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote respiratory health. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
